HGSS.448.0000:
Where in the world is Viridian’s
Gym Leader?\r
I wanted to challenge him...
HGSS.448.0001:
Viridian’s Gym Leader does not
rely on others!\f
The Gym Leader claims that his policy
is to lose to no one without having\r
any underlings.\f
That makes him even more popular,
and many Trainers have come to work\r
for him.
HGSS.448.0002:
I heard that the Gym in Cinnabar
is gone.\f
I wonder what became of Blaine,
the Gym Leader.
HGSS.448.0003: My dream is to become a Gym Leader.
